title: Allow Dockerfile content to come from stdin

comments.body:
Code LGTM.

@rhatdan Could you add an integration test for that?
@pixdrift in case you didn't see this one.
First blush LGTM, test would be good, but want to run a few tests before LGTM'ing

Red Hat CI is throwing up rhatdan:

```
make[1]: Leaving directory '/root/gopath/src/github.com/projectatomic/buildah/docs'
cmd/buildah/bud.go:31::warning: cyclomatic complexity 42 of function budCmd() is high (> 40) (gocyclo)
```

It's always easy....
Once the tests are happy, LGTM.   Works fine in my testing.

gofmt isn't your friend @rhatdan 

```
Error: source files are not formatted according to recommendations. Run "gofmt -s -w" on:
./imagebuildah/build.go
make: *** [validate] Error 1
```
Thanks @tomsweeney for raising the issue, it was on today's todo list! Looks like a neat solution @rhatdan and I will be able to quickly make use of it, so very much appreciated!

:pushpin: Commit 190ced9 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat 190ced970a1ac07b9c79b1536633b85b7644d75c -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
